name: SSDI vs Workers Comp Boise ID

mainEntity.name: SSDI and workers comp interaction Boise accident?
mainEntity.text: SSDI and workers comp interaction Boise accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Combined cannot exceed pre-injury average wages SSDI offset applies.[20]

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise on-the-job with SSDI approval triggers offset reduce comp dollar-for-dollar over 80% AWW. Plan ahead coordinate applications avoid overpayment clawbacks. Attorney navigates offsets preserves income.[20]

description: Combined cannot exceed pre-injury average wages SSDI offset applies.[20]
